title: Salmon Migration Ladder: Completing a Uniform Camera Grid
strategies: diagonal completion: place every new camera on the main diagonal (concentrated, the checker's own poor baseline)
Hammersley completion: fill the remaining cameras with a fixed van-der-Corput low-discrepancy set, ignoring the pre-installed cameras
fixed-aware portfolio: build several rank-1 / Hammersley / jittered candidate fills, union each with the legacy cameras, and keep the one whose EXACT full-set star discrepancy is smallest
local search: seed with a lattice fill then relocate individual cameras toward under-sampled anchored boxes, accepting only discrepancy-reducing moves
